subject: The EP-WXT trigger 01709253145 is likely a flaring star
body:
S.Y. Fu (HUST), D.F. Hu (PMO, CAS), J. Yang (ZZU), Y. Liu (NAO, CAS) on behalf of the Einstein Probe (EP) team: 

The EP-WXT trigger 01709253145 at the time of 2026-01-28T03:17:37 is likely a stellar flare associated with CD-37 6436. The estimated flux of the flare is around 6x10^-11 erg/s/cm^2 in 0.5-4.0 keV, corresponding to an X-ray luminosity of around 5.6x10^32 erg/s.

Launched on January 9, 2024, EP is a space X-ray observatory to monitor the soft X-ray sky with X-ray follow-up capability (Yuan et al. 2022, Handbook of X-ray and Gamma-ray Astrophysics).
